title: Herbal Ethiopian Mustard Seeds Stir-fry
description: This lazy-sunday dish combines tender mustard seeds with a variety of herbal flavors for a vibrant and healthful plant-based meal.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp vegan broth or water (for pressure cooking)

instructions: Heat the oil in a pressure cooker over medium heat.
Add minced garlic, ginger, and onion. Sauté for about 3 minutes until fragrant but not browned.
Stir in mustard seeds and cook until they start to pop (about 2-3 minutes).
Pour in lemon juice, salt, and vegetable broth/water. Stir well.
Add the bell peppers and spinach leaves. Cover the cooker and seal with a pressure cooking lid.
Cook on high pressure for about 1 minute, then quick-release to release remaining steam (do not open until cool).
Toss the mixture with chopped cilantro just before serving.
